vocab.meaning: bị thu hút bởi/có xu hướng chọn
vocab.example: I naturally gravitated towards computer science due to my lifelong fascination with automated systems.
It has been a burning ambition of mine to explore the intricacies of international law since high school.

vocab.meaning: phù hợp với năng khiếu cá nhân
vocab.example: I opted for architecture because it perfectly aligns with my aptitude for spatial reasoning and design.
Theoretical physics is incredibly intellectually stimulating, constantly challenging my analytical boundaries.

vocab.meaning: mở đường cho/tạo tiền đề cho
vocab.example: I believe a degree in biotechnology will pave the way for a rewarding career in genetic research.
Studying economics in tandem with psychology allows me to understand consumer behavior from a holistic perspective.

vocab.meaning: tiếng gọi nghề nghiệp (đam mê mãnh liệt)
vocab.example: For me, nursing isn't just a major; it’s a vocation driven by a deep-seated desire to help others.
This major provides the ideal environment to nurture my curiosity about how global markets fluctuate.

vocab.meaning: kỹ năng có giá trị trên thị trường lao động
vocab.example: I chose Data Science primarily to acquire marketable skills that are in high demand in the current digital economy.
Mathematics is the cornerstone of all engineering disciplines, which is why I decided to master it first.
